enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unnaithaan Ninaikayila'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Pazhaya Vannarapettai'?

The movie revolves around themes of love and relationships, with this song highlighting the protagonist's emotional journey.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Velmurugan and composed by Jubin.

When was 'Unnaithaan Ninaikayila' released?

The song was released on December 2, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unnaithaan Ninaikayila, the protagonist reflects on love and dreams, evoking a sense of nostalgia and yearning. The soothing melody, combined with Velmurugan's heartfelt rendition, creates an atmosphere of romance that resonates with listeners. This song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of longing and connection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Its lyrical depth and melodic charm leave a lasting impression, inviting listeners to reminisce about their own love stories.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnaithaan Ninaikayila from Pazhaya Vannarapettai is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Velmurugan's soulful vocals and Jubin's enchanting music direction, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. Experience the magic of nostalgia and romance wrapped in beautiful lyrics that resonate deeply with the heart.
stanzaMeanings: In my thoughts, there is no sleep, my two eyes are confused, giving hands to dreams.
In the night of the day, there is a special time.
When I sleep, you come in my dreams.
In my thoughts, there is no sleep, my two eyes are confused, giving hands to dreams.
I don't understand you, do you understand me? My heart is different from your heart.
My heart melts, does your heart melt too?
When will you understand me? When will you reach out to me?
In my thoughts, there is no sleep, my two eyes are confused, giving hands to dreams.
Because of what I like about you, my heart has given itself to you. It has mixed feelings and has become confused.
I cry inside but smile outside.
Life is not just about money; there is both happiness and sorrow. In my life, love is the beginning of both.
In my thoughts, there is no sleep, my two eyes are confused, giving hands to dreams.
